name: @swapper/toolkit
description: DeFi toolkit for AI agents and coding assistants — deposit funds, execute trades, and manage crypto wallets. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenClaw, CrewAI, AutoGPT, and other AI agent frameworks.

skills.name: Swapper Deposit
skills.description: Deposit funds into Swapper-supported chains and protocols.
skills.trigger: When the user wants to deposit, fund, or bridge assets into a wallet or protocol.

skills.name: Swapper Trade
skills.description: Execute token swaps and trades across supported DEXs and aggregators.
skills.trigger: When the user wants to swap, trade, buy, or sell tokens.

skills.name: Swapper Wallet Management
skills.description: Create, import, list, and manage crypto wallets and keys.
skills.trigger: When the user wants to create a wallet, check balances, list accounts, or manage keys.

install.instructions: Add this toolkit to your project: claude mcp add-skill @swapper/toolkit
install.postInstall: Run /swapper-wallet-management to set up your first wallet.
